item.title: Sunday Morning Solved WIth This Time Saving Meal
item.description: These Freezer Breakfast Sandwiches are the thing to meal prep for busy mornings. These are filled with homemade maple sage chicken sausage patties, light and fluffy egg and a slice of cheddar cheese. Reheat these in the oven, microwave or airfryer for easy mornings.

media:content.media:title: Sunday Morning Solved WIth This Time Saving Meal
media:content.media:description: These Freezer Breakfast Sandwiches are the thing to meal prep for busy mornings. These are filled with homemade maple sage chicken sausage patties, light and fluffy egg and a slice of cheddar cheese. Reheat these in the oven, microwave or airfryer for easy mornings.

item.description: Make this delicious toast for your next dinner

item.title: Creamy and Delicious Green Pea Risotto
item.description: Make this delicious dish for your next dinner

media:content.media:description: Make this delicious dish for your next dinner

item.title: Cozy Apple Cobbler
item.description: This Easy Apple Cobbler recipe has a super fluffy, deliciously sweet topping. The apples are perfectly sweet and spiced. This is a simple, quick and easy dessert using the fresh fruit of fall! An absolute must is a scoop of ice cream on top.

media:content.media:title: Cozy Apple Cobbler
media:content.media:description: This Easy Apple Cobbler recipe has a super fluffy, deliciously sweet topping. The apples are perfectly sweet and spiced. This is a simple, quick and easy dessert using the fresh fruit of fall! An absolute must is a scoop of ice cream on top.

item.title: Portobello Mushroom Burgers You'll Love
item.description: These burgers are so juicy and are perfect when I’m craving something meatless but still satisfying and tasty.

media:content.media:title: Portobello Mushroom Burgers You'll Love
media:content.media:description: These burgers are so juicy and are perfect when I’m craving something meatless but still satisfying and tasty.

item.title: Romantizing my iced coffee
item.description: Romantizing my iced coffee ☕️

item.title: The Most Popular Apple Cobbler
item.description: Scoop it warm and let the brown sugar apples steal the show.

media:content.media:title: The Most Popular Apple Cobbler
media:content.media:description: Scoop it warm and let the brown sugar apples steal the show.

item.title: The Crispiest Garlic Chicken Wings
item.description: These Garlic Chicken Wings are inspired by a Cuban Mojo marinade. Baked on a sheet pan and marinated in a garlic, orange, and lime-based mixture, this is one of the easiest and most delicious party dishes you can make.

media:content.media:title: The Crispiest Garlic Chicken Wings
media:content.media:description: These Garlic Chicken Wings are inspired by a Cuban Mojo marinade. Baked on a sheet pan and marinated in a garlic, orange, and lime-based mixture, this is one of the easiest and most delicious party dishes you can make.

item.title: Creamsicle Cake
item.description: This creamsicle cake tastes like all of our childhood ice cream dreams but in cake form. A strong orange, cream and vanilla flavor are found throughout. And the texture of the cake is fluffy and delicious. Pair it with a fluffy cream cheese frosting for the most beautiful cake.

media:content.media:title: Creamsicle Cake
media:content.media:description: This creamsicle cake tastes like all of our childhood ice cream dreams but in cake form. A strong orange, cream and vanilla flavor are found throughout. And the texture of the cake is fluffy and delicious. Pair it with a fluffy cream cheese frosting for the most beautiful cake.

item.title: Tres Leches Cake Is the Best Type of Cake
item.description: This classic Tres Leches Cake is everything you want it to be: moist, milky, and absolutely delicious. The fluffy sponge soaks up the three-milk mixture, and it’s all topped with billowy whipped cream and cinnamon.

media:content.media:title: Tres Leches Cake Is the Best Type of Cake
media:content.media:description: This classic Tres Leches Cake is everything you want it to be: moist, milky, and absolutely delicious. The fluffy sponge soaks up the three-milk mixture, and it’s all topped with billowy whipped cream and cinnamon.

item.title: My Prettiest Make-Ahead Desser
item.description: Let these chill, then finish with the fluffy, citrusy magic.

media:content.media:title: My Prettiest Make-Ahead Desser
media:content.media:description: Let these chill, then finish with the fluffy, citrusy magic.

item.title: My Pride & Joy: The Softest Dinner Rolls
item.description: These Salted Honey Parker House Rolls are iconic, light and fluffy. They’re baked up until perfectly puffy and brushed with honey butter and topped with flakey sea salt.

media:content.media:title: My Pride & Joy: The Softest Dinner Rolls
media:content.media:description: These Salted Honey Parker House Rolls are iconic, light and fluffy. They’re baked up until perfectly puffy and brushed with honey butter and topped with flakey sea salt.

item.title: Zucchini pasta
item.description: this zucchini pasta is one of my favorite weeknight meals. kinda like pasta al nerano but a lil’ different. it’s easy, hides vegetables and tastes fresh and delicious! recipe link in profile.

media:content.media:title: Zucchini pasta
media:content.media:description: this zucchini pasta is one of my favorite weeknight meals. kinda like pasta al nerano but a lil’ different. it’s easy, hides vegetables and tastes fresh and delicious! recipe link in profile.

item.title: The Dreamiest and Most Delicious Breakfast: Orange French Toast
item.description: A burst of summer and brightness meets French toast. If you’ve ever wanted to make the richest, most delicious French toast, first you need to make a custard. This one is made with Orange Juice, which adds the most delicious hint of orange. Dunk thick slices of bread into the custard and cook in a bit of butter. SO GOOD. The perfect summer brunch food. Recipe on my site, acozykitchen.com

media:content.media:title: The Dreamiest and Most Delicious Breakfast: Orange French Toast
media:content.media:description: A burst of summer and brightness meets French toast. If you’ve ever wanted to make the richest, most delicious French toast, first you need to make a custard. This one is made with Orange Juice, which adds the most delicious hint of orange. Dunk thick slices of bread into the custard and cook in a bit of butter. SO GOOD. The perfect summer brunch food. Recipe on my site, acozykitchen.com

item.title: The Easiest Summer Dessert: Grilled Peaches
item.description: welcome to the easiest summer dessert: grilled peaches, drizzle with olive oil, a sprinkle of sugar and then grill on high heat. serve with vanilla ice cream, a drizzle of olive oil, balsamic glaze and a pinch of flakey salt. i learned this “recipe” a long time ago and it has always been a summer go-to of mine!

media:content.media:title: The Easiest Summer Dessert: Grilled Peaches
media:content.media:description: welcome to the easiest summer dessert: grilled peaches, drizzle with olive oil, a sprinkle of sugar and then grill on high heat. serve with vanilla ice cream, a drizzle of olive oil, balsamic glaze and a pinch of flakey salt. i learned this “recipe” a long time ago and it has always been a summer go-to of mine!

item.title: The Cutest Lemon Pavlovas
item.description: these cloud-like pavlovas filled with lemon curd are the perfect dessert for summer

media:content.media:title: The Cutest Lemon Pavlovas
media:content.media:description: these cloud-like pavlovas filled with lemon curd are the perfect dessert for summer

item.title: Delicious Turkey Club Sandwich Recipe
item.description: a simple sandwich that’s perfect for the beach or pool. this one is simple but with a twist of chipotle mayonnaise for a punch of spice. but the rest of the ingredients are v chill. here’s the full recipe.

media:content.media:title: Delicious Turkey Club Sandwich Recipe
media:content.media:description: a simple sandwich that’s perfect for the beach or pool. this one is simple but with a twist of chipotle mayonnaise for a punch of spice. but the rest of the ingredients are v chill. here’s the full recipe.

item.title: The Most Popular Apple Cobbler
item.description: This Easy Apple Cobbler recipe has a super fluffy, deliciously sweet topping. The apples are perfectly sweet and spiced. This is a simple, quick and easy dessert using the fresh fruit of fall! An absolute must is a scoop of ice cream on top.

media:content.media:title: The Most Popular Apple Cobbler
media:content.media:description: This Easy Apple Cobbler recipe has a super fluffy, deliciously sweet topping. The apples are perfectly sweet and spiced. This is a simple, quick and easy dessert using the fresh fruit of fall! An absolute must is a scoop of ice cream on top.

item.title: Let's make Limoncello Sunrise
item.description: This drink is an ideal summer drink. refreshing, citrusy, and easy to drink. perfect for a hot summer day.

media:content.media:title: Let's make Limoncello Sunrise
media:content.media:description: This drink is an ideal summer drink. refreshing, citrusy, and easy to drink. perfect for a hot summer day.

item.title: The Coziest Meal: Cornbread Chicken & Dumplings
item.description: This recipe for Chicken and Dumplings is cozy, comforting and delicious. It’s made in one pot for simplicity. Use a store-bought rotisserie chicken to make this the easiest weeknight meal. Serve this with my Fall Harvest Salad and Cranberry Margaritas for the perfect cozy meal.

media:content.media:title: The Coziest Meal: Cornbread Chicken & Dumplings
media:content.media:description: This recipe for Chicken and Dumplings is cozy, comforting and delicious. It’s made in one pot for simplicity. Use a store-bought rotisserie chicken to make this the easiest weeknight meal. Serve this with my Fall Harvest Salad and Cranberry Margaritas for the perfect cozy meal.
